channel.title: Distributed-Systems on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Systems on Systology

item.title: Agent Orchestration
item.description: Principles for architecting autonomous multi-agent systems; focusing on stateful orchestration, unified memory across agents, hand-off protocols, and human-in-the-loop governance for long-running workflows.

item.title: Service Resilience
item.description: Design patterns for reliable microservice behavior under load; implementing strict request idempotency, non-blocking async I/O, robust circuit breakers, durable background queues, and observability.

item.title: Distributed Web Crawler
item.description: A highly resilient architectural design for a Google-scale web crawler; heavily focusing on breadth-first search (BFS), extensive DNS resolution caching, and polite handling of malicious domains.

item.title: URL Shortener & Pastebin
item.description: A robust structural design for a highly available, extremely read-heavy service bridging short aliases to long URLs; implementing Base62 encoding, Snowflake IDs, and strict collision avoidance.

item.title: Real-Time Collaborative WebApp
item.description: A real-time synchronization design for collaborative applications (e.g., Google Docs, Figma); utilizing WebSockets and Operational Transformation (OT) or CRDTs for consistent state resolution.

item.title: Video Transcoding & Streaming Pipeline
item.description: An inherently scalable video ingestion and transcoding system architecture; asynchronously chunking heavy media, extracting actionable features, and steadily outputting adaptive bitrates via worker pools.

item.title: Flash Sale / Ticketmaster
item.description: A high-resiliency architecture for extreme traffic bursts, utilizing virtual waiting rooms and atomic inventory management to ensure fair distribution under load.

item.title: Notification System
item.description: A robust architectural design for a high-throughput, multi-channel notification service supporting push, email, and SMS; featuring strict prioritization queues, tiered rate limiting, and reliable delivery tracking.

item.title: Payment System
item.description: A high-integrity architecture for global payment gateways and internal ledgers, emphasizing rigorous idempotency, eventual consistency, and deterministic recovery.

item.title: Distributed Caching Layer for VCS
item.description: An optimized distributed caching architecture designed to drastically reduce backend I/O and accelerate VCS operations; intelligently caching heavy objects and hashes with ultra-low latency.

item.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Platform
item.description: A secure platform design for advanced federated learning pipelines; training models directly across edge devices without sharing raw telemetry, utilizing secure local aggregation and robust privacy safeguards.
